prompt: A clean fashion comparison studio photo of 4 adult East Asian women standing side by side against a plain light gray seamless background, full body visible from head to shoes, photographed straight-on with soft diffused lighting and a polished commercial look. Above each woman, centered over her head in black serif text, place height labels reading exactly: 145cm, 155cm, 165cm, 175cm. Emphasize realistic proportional differences in height while keeping all four women slim, elegant, and similarly styled, with long dark brown to black softly wavy hair and neutral expressions. Their faces are obscured by smooth rectangular blur blocks. The women stand very close together in a friendly pose, with subtle arm contact and one woman lightly resting an arm around another. Use a coordinated beige, cream, taupe, and soft blush wardrobe palette with smart casual feminine outfits and matching ivory loafers. Woman 1 under the 145cm label wears a short-sleeve cream ribbed knit top tucked into high-waisted light beige shorts with a fabric belt, plus a small quilted shoulder bag with a chain strap. Woman 2 under the 155cm label wears a white long-sleeve blouse with a bow tie at the collar and a taupe mini skirt with a slight flared hem, carrying a small light beige crossbody handbag. Woman 3 under the 165cm label wears a sleeveless blush-beige ribbed knit top and a simple ivory mini skirt. Woman 4 under the 175cm label wears a draped white V-neck blouse with sleeves rolled to the forearms, high-waisted taupe belted shorts, and a medium taupe shoulder bag. All 4 women wear cream or ivory horsebit loafers. Composition is vertical, centered, minimal, stylish, realistic, like a fashion catalog image comparing female heights.
